items.title: Fire at Antwerp apartment block kills at least six
items.dek: A man is seen clambering through a window to escape black smoke in the block where some 200 people live.
items.body: A man is seen clambering through a window to escape black smoke in the block where some 200 people live.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Canada will take part in Eurovision Song Contest 2027
items.dek: The country becomes the first new participant since Australia joined the contest in 2015.
items.body: The country becomes the first new participant since Australia joined the contest in 2015.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Three die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
items.dek: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.
items.body: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.
items.author: IriLine Desk
